heading_content_part: Protecting your privacy is important to us. We hope the following statement will help you understand how Itech solution apps deals with the personal identifiable information you may occasionally provide to us via Internet (the ‘Google Play Store’ Platform).

decoder_heading: Generally, we do not collect any personal identifiable information from you
ident_heading: Generally, we do not collect any personal identifiable information from you
heading_content_part: Generally, we do not collect any personal identifiable information from you when you download our Android applications. To be specific, we do not require the consumers to get registered before downloading the application, nor do we keep track of the consumers’ visits of our application, we even don’t have a Server to store such personal identifiable information.

heading_content_part: Itech solution apps uses Facebook as ads provider. Facebook wants to show ads that are relevant to you. For more information, please checkhttps://m.facebook.com/ads/ad_choices.

heading_content_part: The only situation we may get access to your personal information is when you personally decide to email us your feedback or to provide us with a bug report. The personal information we may get from you in that situation are strictly limited to your name, email address and your survey response only.

heading_content_part: In above situation, we guarantee that your personal identifiable information will only be used for contacting you and improving our services. If you have concern about your personal information being misused, or if you want further information about our privacy policy and what it means, please feel free to email us at itechsolutionapps@gmail.com , we will endeavor to provide clear answers to your questions in a timely manner.
